data.body: Pushed the 13-commit remediation stack to Gerrit (changes 202-214), all with Change-Id + rebar-ticket trailers, rebased onto current origin/main. Full suite green (4267 passed; the 1 e2e editor failure is a pre-existing worktree-env issue — missing editor_assets/node_modules — verified identical at baseline). Merged already: 186/187/188 incl. the Critical has_llm_steps fix. 189 (child-closure docs) to re-push after the stack merges (Fix B/change 212 adds the .gitleaks.toml that clears its false-positive). Items 13/14/15/9.3 (config/reconcile splits, shared-helper sweep, dir reorg, facade reroute) CHECKPOINTED for a post-release maintenance pass.
